headline: How to Play Yum! Brands Stock on Reports It Will Sell Pizza Hut for $2.7 Billion
summary: Yum! Brands is streamlining its portfolio with a $2.7 billion Pizza Hut divestiture, potentially unlocking capital for shareholder returns and higher-growth initiatives.
